title: Judelow death sound
description: This is a Resource Pack that plays the apex legends knockdown sound and some people know as "The Judelow Death Sound"
body:
JudeLow Death Sound Pack This pack replaces the standard Minecraft player death sound with the custom JudeLow audio. It’s designed to be clean, responsive, and easy to install.
Key Fixes:
No More "Double Sounds": Standard packs often glitch and play the default sound over the custom one. This pack is properly configured to mute the default "bone crack" so you only hear the JudeLow audio.

Instant Audio: I've set the audio to trigger without delay, so it plays the exact moment you hit 0 HP.

Volume Boost: The sound has been leveled so it’s clear even during intense gameplay.

Version Support:
Built for: 26.1.2 (Format 84) and 1.21.1 (Format 34).

Cross-Version: It works on almost any version of modern Minecraft. If the game says the pack is "for an older version," you can safely ignore the warning—it will still work fine.

Modpack Compatible: Works with Fabric, Forge, and any client side setups like Vencord or custom launchers.

Installation:
